attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"content": "Jane Smith
jane.smith@example.com |linkedin.com/in/janesmithUX |dribbble.com/janesmith
Summary
Highly creative and data-driven UI/UX Engineer with over 4 years of experience designing intuitive,
accessible, and stunning digital interfaces. Expert in translating complex user flows into beautiful high-
fidelity prototypes using Figma. Passionate about bridging the gap between visual design and front-end
implementation.
Experience
Senior UI/UX Designer Creative Digital Agency (2021 - Present)
•Spearheaded the entire visual redesign of a flagship e-commerce platform, increasing user retention by
35% utilizing Figma components and variants.
•Conducted comprehensive user research, A/B testing, and heuristic evaluations to inform design deci-
sions and iterate on user flows.
•Established and maintained a robust scalable Design System in Figma to ensure visual consistency
across web and mobile applications.
•Collaborated directly with frontend React engineers to hand off pixel-perfect spec files and interactive
animations.
UX Engineer Innovative Startups LLC (2018 - 2021)
•Developed wireframes, user personas, and high-fidelity mockups for 12+ client applications ranging
from fintech dashboards to healthcare portals.
•Built fully interactive prototypes in Figma emphasizing complex micro-interactions, responsive design
constraints, and auto-layout.
•Converted initial design concepts into functional frontend components using HTML, CSS, and Tail-
wind.
Skills
•Design Tools: Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, InVision, Zeplin, Miro
•UX Methods: User Research, Wireframing, Rapid Prototyping, Usability Testing, Information Ar-
chitecture
•Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Basic React.js
•Other: Design Systems, Auto Layout, Accessibility (WCAG), Typography, Agile
Education
Bachelor of Fine Arts in Interaction Design Example School of Art, Class of 2018
1", "source_type": "resume"}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
"**Concise Professional Summary:**

Highly accomplished UI/UX Engineer and Designer with 4+ years of experience driving digital innovation through intuitive, accessible, and visually stunning interfaces. Skilled in translating complex user flows into high-fidelity prototypes using Figma, with expertise in design systems, user research, and front-end implementation. Proven track record of increasing user retention and driving business growth through data-driven design decisions and collaborative efforts with cross-functional teams.

**Key Strengths:**

- Expertise in Figma for high-fidelity prototyping and design systems
- Strong background in user research, A/B testing, and usability evaluations
- Strong collaboration and handoff skills with front-end engineers
- Proficient in HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, and basic React.js

**Professional Experience:**

- Senior UI/UX Designer, Creative Digital Agency (2021-Present)
- UX Engineer, Innovative Startups LLC (2018-2021)"
